name: PetSaver
tagline: Pet care app for medication tracking and provider search
problem: Pet owners juggle medication schedules and vet searches across apps that don't talk to each other.
solution: A single platform for managing pet health records, tracking medications, and finding nearby care providers.
impact: Pet health records, medication tracking, and provider search in one place

name: Business Dashboard
tagline: Retail operations dashboard for sales and staffing
problem: Retail managers track sales, staffing, and operations across separate spreadsheets that don't connect.
solution: A dashboard that puts sales performance, staff schedules, and operations data in one place.
impact: One view of sales and staffing across locations
Replaced manual spreadsheet workflows with live data

name: Amblog
problem: Blogging platforms are either too stripped-down or too bloated. Getting content online shouldn't take this much setup.
solution: A publishing platform with dynamic routing, a content editor, and server-rendered pages built for SEO.
impact: Fast, clean read and write experience that scales without fighting the platform

name: Chou Bot
tagline: Discord bot for server moderation and automation
problem: Manually moderating Discord servers and assigning roles doesn't scale. One busy day and things fall apart.
solution: A bot that handles moderation, role assignment, activity logging, and community events automatically.
impact: Roles, logs, and community events run without any admin input
